title: Ministry of Justice: departmental spending over £25,000, 2021
body: "Over £25,000 transparency spend data are taken from MOJ finance systems and the NOMS Phoenix finance system. Transparency data for arms length bodies (ALB) are included in either MOJ or NOMS datasets, or taken from their own accounting systems.  The data relate to accounts payable payment and credit note transactions for grants and procurement spend, recorded at the time the transaction was processed on MOJ, NOMS and ALB accounting systems. The data excludes any subsequent journal transactions (for example to make corrections) and accounts receivable receipts. "
